commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The branch defers and cancels closed attached-menu rebuilds around refresh work, keeps stale nonempty menus visible on open during store or token refreshes, adds DEBUG lifecycle logs, and extends status-menu refresh tests.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence local reproduction was run in this read-only review. Source inspection shows current main still rebuilds stale menus synchronously on open, and the PR body supplies live-app logs for the after-fix path.
commands.review_followup: - One narrow mechanical cleanup remains: align the DEBUG closed-menu preparation delay seam with release timing and make the tests opt into zero delay explicitly.

target.title: Defer closed menu rebuilds during refresh
target.body:
## Summary
Prepare attached closed menus after refresh work settles, and keep stale nonempty menu content on open while store or token refreshes are active.

## Validation
- `swift test --filter StatusMenuOpenRefreshTests`
- `git diff --check`

## Runtime Proof
Pushed cleanup fix at `c39cb661`, then added debug-only redacted lifecycle logs at `998f1a07` to prove the real app path without exposing menu text or account data.

Focused menu-refresh proof run:

```text
$ swift test --filter StatusMenuOpenRefreshTests
Test "closed attached menu is prepared before next open after invalidation" passed
Test "closed attached menu preparation waits for store refresh to finish" passed
Test "closed attached menu preparation waits for token refresh to finish" passed
Test "closed menu rebuild cleanup runs when weak menu disappears" passed
Test "menu open keeps stale nonempty content while store refresh is active" passed
Test "menu open keeps stale nonempty content while token refresh is active" passed
Test run with 25 tests in 1 suite passed
```

Live app proof from a freshly packaged debug build at `/Users/alec/Dev/CodexBar/CodexBar.app`, driven through macOS Accessibility on June 1, 2026 PDT:

```text
[2026-06-01T07:05:41.696Z] [DEBUG] com.steipete.codexbar.app: menu open kept existing content during refresh items=13 provider=claude storeRefreshing=1
[2026-06-01T07:05:43.290Z] [DEBUG] com.steipete.codexbar.app: closed menu rebuild completed items=17 provider=claude
```

Interpretation: while a refresh was active, opening the stale nonempty menu kept the existing 13 items instead of rebuilding synchronously; after the menu was closed and refresh work settled, the closed-menu rebuild path populated the next version with 17 items. The proof is redacted to lifecycle state, item counts, provider id, and refresh state only.

Also ran `git diff --check`; it passed with no output.
target.author: prospectore

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
